children.heading: .—Support for Research
children.label: a .—Support for Research
children.text: The Administrator of General Services, in consultation with the Federal Communications Commission, shall seek to promote research by federal agencies, state agencies, and private entities to reduce the cost and improve the capabilities of telecommunications devices and systems that provide accessibility to hearing-impaired and speech-impaired individuals.
modifications that the Administrator determines are necessary to achieve the objectives of ; andsection 18102(a) of this title
technological improvements in telecommunications devices and systems that provide accessibility to hearing-impaired and speech-impaired individuals.
